TRIAL RESET TO NOV-12-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-08-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED (SERVICE FEE $0.00(WAIVED) SERVED SEP-30-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DUKKER, TATJANA
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$28.00<WAIVED>) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORFMAN, DEBORAH AS TO DEFENDANT DUKKER, STEPHEN
SMALL CLAIMS CLAIM CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM.
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2009 - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUED TO DEC-02-2009 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 206 PER AGREEMENT OF ALL PARTIES. (206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2009 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIMS - TRIAL COURT CALENDAR ON DEC-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, JUDGE MONICA WILEY. (206)
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-02-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO STEPHEN DUKKER BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF DEC-02-2009 AT 10:00AM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DORFMAN, DEBORAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUKKER, TATJANA $1,562.26 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,562.26, THE COURT AWARDS $591.00 IN MEDICAL BILLS, $221.26 IN PROPERTY DAMAGES AND $750.00 IN NONECONOMIC DAMAGES. DEFENDANT STEPHEN DUKKER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO LACK OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST TATJANA DUKKER ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEFT
CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT'S INSURER REGARDING PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF, FILED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DUKKER, TATJANA
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
